claim: chenhg5/cc-connect is the highest-traction OSS bridge (6,393 stars, 596 forks, last pushed 2026-04-27), connecting Claude Code/Cursor/Gemini CLI/Codex to Slack via Socket Mode plus Telegram, Discord, Feishu, DingTalk, LINE, WeChat Work, with no public IP required.
quote: Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

claim: mpociot/claude-code-slack-bot has 157 stars and 68 forks but is essentially abandoned (single-commit repo, last pushed 2025-06-27); uses Slack Socket Mode with streaming responses and MCP server passthrough.
quote: Connect your local Claude Code agent with Slack ... Real-time updates - messages update as Claude thinks ... Socket Mode (uses SLACK_APP_TOKEN with connections:write scope)

claim: tomeraitz/claude-slack-bridge (21 stars, last pushed 2026-04-27) is an MCP server purpose-built for human-in-the-loop: Claude Code blocks at the kernel level and waits on a Slack reply, with one Docker container serving all projects.
quote: MCP server that lets Claude Code pause mid-task and ask a human a question via Slack — then resume once you reply.

claim: jeremylongshore/claude-code-slack-channel (15 stars, 12 forks, actively pushed 2026-04-27) is the most security-hardened option: Socket Mode + MCP stdio, hash-chained audit journal, five-layer prompt-injection defense, policy-gated MCP tools, requires Claude Code v2.1.80+.
quote: Two-way Slack bridge for Claude Code. Socket Mode + MCP stdio. Hash-chained tamper-evident audit journal, per-thread session isolation, policy-gated MCP tools, permission relay with Block Kit buttons, five-layer prompt-injection defense.

claim: yuya-takeyama/cc-slack (14 stars, Go, MIT, last pushed 2025-08-23) exposes a /cc Slack slash command that opens a modal for choosing the working directory and an initial prompt before spawning a Claude Code session.
quote: Interact with Claude Code on Slack ... using the /cc slash command to start a session where a modal opens with directory selection

claim: 41fred/claude-code-slack (15 stars, Python, MIT, pushed 2026-02-20) takes a hybrid local-daemon-plus-Railway-worker architecture so the Slack-facing component can run on a public PaaS while Claude Code stays local.
quote: Talk to Claude Code from Slack. Local daemon + Railway worker architecture.

claim: AnandChowdhary/claude-code-slack-bot (11 stars, last pushed 2025-09-04) is built on top of the Claude Code GitHub Action and turns Slack feature requests/bug reports into GitHub issues with auto-implementation PRs.
quote: 🤖 Use Claude Code from a Slack bot, built on top of Claude Code Action

claim: engineers-hub-ltd's slack-claude-code-integration (11 stars, JS/MIT, last pushed 2025-06-30) is an MCP-based collaborative team layer but appears stalled with no commits in 10 months.
quote: Slack integration for Claude Code using MCP (Model Context Protocol). Enable your team to use Claude Code collaboratively through Slack.

claim: 106-/claude-code-slack-agent (1 star, Python, no license, last pushed 2025-08-01) is a minimal solo experiment wiring the Claude Code SDK to Slack mentions and DMs — illustrative of the long tail of low-traction forks.
quote: A Slack bot that integrates with Claude Code SDK to provide AI-powered responses to user mentions and direct messages.

claim: The dev.to writeup behind claude-slack-bridge documents the human-in-the-loop pattern as the motivating use case: Claude posts to Slack, blocks via Unix domain socket, then resumes when the thread reply lands.
quote: An MCP server that creates a real-time, two-way communication channel between Claude Code and Slack ... enabling asynchronous AI workflows where developers can step away while their AI assistant waits for feedback.

claim: Issue #21527 in anthropics/claude-code (open since 2026-01-28) confirms the official Slack integration is GitHub-only, which is the explicit gap the OSS projects keep filling — multiple bots support arbitrary local repos and GitLab.
quote: The Claude Code Slack integration currently only supports GitHub repositories ... When invoking Claude Code from Slack, the 'Select repository' option only shows GitHub repos, and the documentation confirms 'GitHub only: Currently supports repositories on GitHub.'
